caption_text:
@cristiano felt every second of that win.

Heart rate at the second goal: 177 BPM 🔥
Heart rate at full time: 154 BPM 🏆

From goal to glory the WHOOP data captured it all. Some moments are bigger than the game and you can see it in every heartbeat. Congrats CR7 and Al-Nassr for the legendary win.

caption_text: Different backgrounds but a common passion!

Nassrawis… what a season. From day one, we knew what we wanted and what it would take to get there. We worked, fought and gave everything in every training and every game. It wasn’t an easy road, but we did it together. Thank you for believing in us and standing by our side every step of the way.

🎥
‏فرحـة ⁧‫#النصر‬⁩ .. موسمٍ كامل كنا نحتفـل بها سويًا
‏اليـوم يقـود احتفاليتنا قائدنا 🤩
Usually, he leads the celebrations.
Tonight, he is the celebration. 🐐👑💛
